positive: A mesmerizing minimalist illustration of a stylized cosmic landscape. Depict interlocking geometric planetary orbits forming a vibrant nebula background. In the foreground, place a single, elegant silhouette of a soaring phoenix rising from crystalline geometric ground. The color palette should utilize deep ultramarine blues, vibrant magenta magentas, brilliant gold leaf accents, and stark obsidian blacks. Composition must be centrally focused with strong contrast and clean, defined lines, optimized for screen printing on fabric. High detail, vector graphic style, symmetrical composition, cosmic realism, tarot card aesthetic, flat lay perfect.
